_instructions.purpose: This is the lightweight loader file. Share this file at the start of every session. The main knowledge base URL is embedded — fetch it directly when a chunk is needed.
how_to_load: 1. At session start: read only this file. Acknowledge it is loaded. Do not fetch the knowledge base yet.
2. When the user makes a request: scan the top-level index to identify relevant domains.
3. Suggest which domain(s) and sub-index keys seem relevant. Wait for user confirmation.
4. After confirmation: fetch knowledge_base_url and load ONLY the confirmed chunk(s) by key path.
5. After reading a chunk: summarize what was loaded and proceed with the task.
6. Never speculatively read additional chunks unless the user requests it.
_instructions.note: The index below reflects the top-level domains and their sub-index summaries. Sub-topic details live only in the knowledge base at knowledge_base_url.

meta._summary: Project-level metadata: author, dates, versioning, global tags.

research._summary: Core research areas, sources, and findings.

concepts._summary: Key terms, definitions, and conceptual frameworks.

entities._summary: Named entities: people, organizations, locations, artifacts.

timeline._summary: Chronological events and milestones relevant to the project.

notes._summary: Working notes, drafts, and session logs.
